---
title: "scout_targets.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\scripts\scout_targets.py"
loc: 77
complexity: 4
logic_score: 8.75
style_score: 4.01
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.62
---

## Intent
The `scout_targets.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on scout. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via scout. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.annex](file://src.core.annex)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.edda](file://src.sentinel.wardens.edda)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.freya](file://src.sentinel.wardens.freya)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.huginn](file://src.sentinel.wardens.huginn)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.mimir](file://src.sentinel.wardens.mimir)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.runecaster](file://src.sentinel.wardens.runecaster)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.valkyrie](file://src.sentinel.wardens.valkyrie)

### Exports
- `scout`
